subject: A bespoke system for Aman Spa New York
body:
Aman Spa New York's three-story flagship signals the exclusive clientele MaRe is built for. MaRe Eye, our trichologist-developed scalp diagnostic, lifts retail conversion from the industry-standard 3% to 40%+, tying bespoke Philip Martin's recommendations to real scalp data. We partner exclusively with venues that match our standard — I'd like to explore whether yours does.

— Rebecca

subject: A curated opportunity for DePasquale The Spa
body:
DePasquale The Spa's massive 26,000 sq ft facility with a highly affluent suburban clientele is precisely who MaRe is designed for. MaRe Eye, our trichologist-developed scalp diagnostic, lifts retail conversion from the industry-standard 3% to 40%+, tying every product recommendation to real scalp data. We partner exclusively with venues that match our standard — I'd like to explore whether yours does.

— Rebecca

subject: A curated opportunity for IGK Salon Soho
body:
IGK Salon Soho's trendsetting styles and high-profile celebrity clientele in Soho align perfectly with MaRe's focus. MaRe Eye, our trichologist-developed scalp diagnostic, elevates retail conversion from the industry-standard 3% to 40%+ by grounding every product recommendation in client-specific scalp data. We partner exclusively with venues that meet our standard — I'd like to explore whether IGK does.

— Rebecca
